## Summary

Describe the change.

## Issue Link

Closes #

## Scope

- [ ] Repository hygiene
- [ ] Runtime baseline
- [ ] Configuration or secrets
- [ ] Database or migrations
- [ ] RBAC or authorization
- [ ] Rules registry
- [ ] Evidence workflow
- [ ] Deterministic evaluator
- [ ] Alerts
- [ ] Audit logging or exports
- [ ] RAG or AI-assisted workflow
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests only

## Authority Boundaries

- [ ] No AI authority over rules, evidence, status, alerts, filings, payments, signatures, attestations, or audit history.
- [ ] Deterministic evaluator authority is preserved.
- [ ] Human-review gates are preserved where required.
- [ ] No client-specific facts were invented.
- [ ] Deleted Client Notes material was not used.
- [ ] Archived sources were not used as controlling current sources.

## Repository Hygiene

- [ ] No secrets committed.
- [ ] No client data committed.
- [ ] No uploaded evidence committed.
- [ ] No database files committed.
- [ ] No vector artifacts committed.
- [ ] No generated caches committed.

## Tests

- [ ] Unit tests added or updated.
- [ ] Negative tests added where applicable.
- [ ] Fixtures added where applicable.
- [ ] Migrations tested where applicable.
- [ ] CI passes.

## Documentation

- [ ] Documentation updated where needed.
- [ ] ADR added where architecture decision changed.

## Out Of Scope

List items intentionally excluded.
